nasb.text: “But I gave you also cleanness of teeth in all your cities And lack of bread in all your places, Yet you have not returned to Me,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: “I gave you cleanness of teeth in all your cities, and lack of bread in all your places, yet you did not return to me,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “雖然我使你們各城的人牙齒乾淨， 各處都缺乏糧食； 但你們仍不歸向我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “我在各城降下饥荒， 使你们遍地缺粮。 尽管如此，你们仍不归向我。 这是耶和华说的。
